# external/ — Adjacent Research Documents

This directory holds research documents that **informed** the CARL / EBCA architecture but are not part of the CARL codebase itself.

## cocl.md — COCL 2.0: Constraint-Driven Computational Ecology of Lifeforms

**Origin:** Aerospace Engineering Research, December 2025  
**Author:** Manas Sadashiv  
**Scope:** Nitinol wing actuator / aeroelastic capstone project — Generative Interference Systems (GIS), Constraint Integration Grids (CIG), and Morphological Constraint Language (MCL)

This document is the source treatise from which Pillar II of `docs/EBCA_MASTER_ROADMAP.md` was synthesized.  
It is stored here rather than in `docs/` because it describes a sibling research thread, not the CARL simulation system directly.

> **Canonical CARL synthesis:** see `docs/EBCA_MASTER_ROADMAP.md`, Pillar II — "Constraint-Driven Morphogenesis."
